tasks.label: Start Development
tasks.detail: Start the application in development mode

tasks.label: Package Application
tasks.detail: Package the application (creates portable exe in out/ folder)

tasks.label: Deploy (Package + Zip)
tasks.detail: Package the application and create a distributable ZIP file

tasks.label: Deploy (SSL Bypass)
tasks.command: set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 && npm run package && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path 'out/AzureWikiEdit-win32-x64' -DestinationPath 'out/AzureWikiEdit-win32-x64.zip' -Force"

windows.command: cmd /c "set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 && npm run package && powershell -Command \"Compress-Archive -Path 'out/AzureWikiEdit-win32-x64' -DestinationPath 'out/AzureWikiEdit-win32-x64.zip' -Force\""

tasks.detail: Deploy with SSL certificate verification disabled (for corporate networks)

windows.command: if exist out rmdir /s /q out && if exist .webpack rmdir /s /q .webpack
